name: Praise Be
ability: Something bad might happen to whoever mispronounces the name of a character.
flavor: He said, "Gather your flock, we will scheme 'till the break of the day." Praise be, to Rory Vivian! Praise be, to the chaos demon! Praise be, to Rory Vivian and all together, fuck the French! He preached from a tower of stone, "Trust nobody, not even your own. Every neighbor's a liar. Fan the blaze, feed the fire. Let suspicions sink deep in your bones." Praise be, to Rory Vivian! Praise be, to the chaos demon! Praise be, to Rory Vivian and all together, fuck the French! (v1.1)
